recommendations.title: The Incredible Journey
recommendations.overview: The story of three pets, a cat and two dogs, who lose their owners when they are all on vacation. Can they find their way home?

recommendations.title: 44 Inch Chest
recommendations.overview: Colin is in agony, shattered by his wife’s infidelity, so his friends kidnap the wife's lover so he can have his revenge.

recommendations.title: Extortion
recommendations.overview: A doctor desperately tries to save his wife and their 5 year old son after their vacation in the Bahamas takes an unexpected turn.

recommendations.title: Vincent N Roxxy
recommendations.overview: A small town loner and a rebellious punk rocker unexpectedly fall in love as they are forced on the run and soon discover violence follows them everywhere.

recommendations.title: Karla
recommendations.overview: Based on real events, Canada's most notorious serial killers, Paul Bernardo and wife Karla Homolka kidnap, sexually abuse, and murder three young girls.

recommendations.title: Julia
recommendations.overview: An alcoholic becomes involved in a fellow A.A. member's plan to kidnap her young son from the boy's wealthy grandfather.

recommendations.title: Bugonia
recommendations.overview: Two conspiracy obsessed young men kidnap the high-powered CEO of a major company, convinced that she is an alien intent on destroying planet Earth.

recommendations.title: Disorder
recommendations.overview: An ex-soldier with PTSD is hired to protect the wife and child of a wealthy Lebanese businessman while he's out of town.

recommendations.title: K.O.
recommendations.overview: A CEO for a television channel finds his life torn apart after he wakes up from coma.

recommendations.title: Seance on a Wet Afternoon
